message.content:

Recent Green phase: Added quoteIndex tracking in processScenario (via let quoteCount), threading it through calculateQuotePremium to policyWideModifierRate to apply -0.15 follow-up discount when quoteIndex > 0.

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return when done.
